{"content":"def load_csv(file_path):

    import pandas as pd

    # Load the CSV file
    data = pd.read_csv(file_path)

    
    # Select only numeric columns for calculating mean
    numeric_cols = data.select_dtypes(['int64', 'float64']).columns

    # Calculate mean of each column
    means = data[numeric_cols].mean()

import pandas as pd
def load_and_calculate(df, num_cols_list):
    # Load CSV using pandas
    df = pd.read_csv('data.csv')

    # Calculate mean for specified columns
    means = df[num_cols_list].mean()

    return means
